insight: The forward gates are direction-specific: 'Enable_Forward_Command' (proxy settings.yml) only gates backend-to-proxy FORWARD_COMMAND packets, while 'Allow_Console_Forward_Command' (bukkit proxy.yml) only gates backend console use of /chc forward. Proxy-originated forwards (rules 'then proxy' operator) execute on the backend console with no config gate, just a server-name match and 500ms dedup.

Before the issue #3790 PR, the proxy console had no way to run commands on backend servers: the proxy only registers Say/Me commands plus vcreload/bcreload, and /chc forward is Bukkit-only. The PR adds a proxy /forward <server> <command> command behind 'Forward.Enabled' (default false) in the proxy settings.yml, using the chatcontrol.command.forward permission; the target backend still needs at least one online player to receive it.
